name: seat-reservation-platform
description: Public seat reservation platform — microservices skeleton (gateway + auth + seat + payment) with mock payment and hold-based concurrency control

scripts.db:up: docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis
scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,auth,seat,payment,web -c blue,magenta,green,yellow,cyan "npm run dev -w @srp/gateway" "npm run dev -w @srp/auth-svc" "npm run dev -w @srp/seat-svc" "npm run dev -w @srp/payment-svc" "npm run dev -w @srp/web"
